Majors.Note: Major 3's final published shape (frozen retroactively from the baseline as of 3dafebd3, the last commit on the v3 line). Retained ONLY as the diff basis that Major 4's Breaks list is verified against — the v3 line is dead and no Uplink was ever built against it. Its own Breaks list is empty because no Major-2 floor is recorded to diff against.

Frozen at v4.1. NOTE the provenance: an intermediate v4.0 (commit 57daa136) briefly published a DIFFERENT v4 shape (VesselControl.ActionGroups as System.Boolean[]) before the action-group retype was collapsed onto the same Major. That collapse is ratified on ContractVersion.Major's stated grounds — the mod is pre-release, no artifact was ever built against the intermediate v4.0, so exactly one v4 will ever be seen: this one. This ledger entry is that ratification, made explicit and machine-checked. It is frozen: every future v4.x Minor must be additive over this Shape.
